reports.engagement_summary: Users were actively logging meals, asking for concrete meal plans, and using HeatherAI for both tactical (what to eat) and behavioral (emotional eating, travel rules) support. Multiple members completed full-day logs and received specific macros/hydration guidance; several conversations focused on one-off events (tooth extraction, travel, celebration meals).

usage_themes.description: Users repeatedly logged full days (breakfast/lunch/snacks/dinner) and asked HeatherAI to record meals; HeatherAI confirmed logs and gave next-step plans and macro estimates.
usage_themes.example_quote: I had for lunch 2 drumsticks no skin with salad

usage_themes.description: Multiple users asked for protein targets, protein counts for meals, and macro/carb breakdowns; HeatherAI provided gram estimates and daily protein targets.
usage_themes.example_quote: How much protein do I need to eat a day? I'm 126 lbs

usage_themes.description: Many users were given and reported the 'Liter by Lunch' water goal; HeatherAI repeatedly used water as a simple behavioral KPI and checked users' progress.
Users sought help for mindless/emotional eating, clean-plate/no-waste issues, and trip-related binge concerns; HeatherAI supplied scripts, rules, and cognitive reframing.
usage_themes.example_quote: Why do I treat my mouth like a trash can for indulgent foods?

usage_themes.description: Users planning trips or reporting celebration days asked for rules to avoid overindulging; HeatherAI gave explicit daily rules (one fun item/day) and meal structure for trips.
usage_themes.example_quote: We're going to Charlottesville to visit my in-laws

usage_themes.description: A user with a same-day tooth extraction asked for pre/post procedure meal plans and soft-food options; HeatherAI provided concrete soft-protein options and safety advice.
usage_themes.example_quote: I'm getting a tooth removed today

usage_themes.description: Users asked whether there is a standalone app and reported difficulties logging small items; HeatherAI explained chat-based access but no product workaround was available.
usage_themes.example_quote: is there a heather AI app? or do I do it all on a desktop

quality_assessments.exchange_summary: User worried that a 150g weight change after eating was meaningful; HeatherAI replied '150g is NOTHING — literally a good bathroom trip'
quality_assessments.reason: Physiologically accurate but blunt — could read as dismissive of user's concern.
quality_assessments.improvement: Open with empathy first ('I hear you — that shift can feel upsetting'), then explain normal weight variability.

quality_assessments.exchange_summary: New user asked about goals and HeatherAI began listing coaching points but one reply is truncated mid-sentence ('and tell you what')
quality_assessments.reason: Incomplete response during onboarding (day 0) reduces trust at the most critical moment.
quality_assessments.improvement: Ensure onboarding messages finish fully and provide a clear next-step checklist.

quality_assessments.exchange_summary: User said they 'can't figure out how to log' chocolates; HeatherAI advised best-guess logging but didn't reduce friction
quality_assessments.reason: Tells the user to estimate but misses the chance to offer a quick-log workaround or template.
quality_assessments.improvement: Offer canned quick-log examples users can copy and flag as a product request for a snack shortcut.

quality_assessments.exchange_summary: User asked if HeatherAI would give daily calorie/protein totals nightly; HeatherAI set clear expectations and described pattern coaching instead
quality_assessments.reason: Clear, honest expectation-setting while describing a superior behavioral approach.

human_intervention_requests.request: Same-day tooth extraction — implicit need for follow-up check-in after procedure.
human_intervention_requests.suggested_action: Send a brief empathetic check-in after the 1pm extraction to confirm recovery and clarify dairy guidance post-procedure.

human_intervention_requests.request: Deep emotional eating pattern work — repeated 'clean plate' behavior causing distress.
human_intervention_requests.suggested_action: Offer a scheduled counseling-style session with a human RD to work through triggers; provide therapy referral option.

human_intervention_requests.request: Onboarding and goal setup (day 0 member) — needs help setting expectations and accountability.
human_intervention_requests.suggested_action: Send a personalized welcome message and offer a 10-15 min onboarding call to set up daily goals and explain how to use HeatherAI.

frustration_signals.signal: Why do I treat my mouth like a trash can for indulgent foods?
frustration_signals.context: Self-directed shame and recurring emotional eating pattern — could reduce long-term adherence if unaddressed.

frustration_signals.signal: Had some unreal chocolates after dinner can't figure out how to log them
frustration_signals.context: Logging friction erodes the 'if you bite it, write it' habit.

frustration_signals.signal: is there a heather AI app? or do I do it all on a desktop
frustration_signals.context: New user expectation mismatch — implies preference for a native mobile experience.

indicators: Asked if there is a HeatherAI app (implies preference for native app)
Day 0 of membership — first impressions matter
churn_risks.recommended_action: Prioritize onboarding touchpoint; emphasize immediate value (daily plan + how to log) to lock in habit in the first week.

indicators: High emotional distress around eating, admission of repeated self-sabotage on trips
Expressed resignation ('feeling like crap doesn't stop them')
churn_risks.recommended_action: Offer proactive scheduling for human coaching and check-ins around upcoming travel.

indicators: Struggled to log chocolates — logging friction
Expressed improvement yesterday but noted friction points today
churn_risks.recommended_action: Send in-chat micro-tutorial on quick logging and encourage estimated logging to reduce friction.

missing_features.user_quote: is there a heather AI app? or do I do it all on a desktop
missing_features.stickiness_impact: Push notifications and easier quick-logging would increase daily engagement and reduce reliance on browser.

missing_features.user_quote: will you give me calorie and protein feedback at the end of each day?
missing_features.stickiness_impact: Automated daily macro summaries would increase perceived value and habit formation.

missing_features.user_quote: Had some unreal chocolates after dinner can't figure out how to log them
missing_features.stickiness_impact: Frictionless estimate mode keeps users logging even when they deviate from plan.

action_items.description: Follow up with Kadoche.K within 24 hours — confirm antibiotic name, clarify dairy guidance post-extraction, and check healing/pain.
Add in-chat micro-tutorial triggered on 'how do I log' and a one-tap quick snack estimate option to reduce logging friction.
Offer Heatherelizabeth06 a scheduled human coaching session on emotional eating and a pre-trip plan for Charlottesville.
Create an onboarding card explaining the chat-as-app workflow for new users (especially mobile) in their first session.
Evaluate building an automated end-of-day calorie/protein summary as an optional opt-in for users who request numeric feedback.
Draft guidance piece: 'Eating around dental procedures + antibiotics' — soft-food alternatives (dairy and non-dairy), hydration tips, when to seek medical advice.
